description: Freeze of Stage28-I final location-boundary cap candidate

stage28ic.description: Initial soft cap result, loss_weight=0.30, gamma=1.0, detach=true

gamma_sweep.description: Stage28-I-D gamma sweep, soft cap, loss_weight=0.30, detach=true

rejection_notes.gamma_0p50: Too weak; total false SUPPORT near baseline (45); location false SUPPORT only reduced to 19
rejection_notes.gamma_0p75: Too weak; total false SUPPORT 43; location false SUPPORT 18
rejection_notes.gamma_1p25: Over-sharpens sigmoid; predicate false SUPPORT spikes to 18; category shift outweighs location gain

loss_weight_sweep.description: Stage28-I-E loss-weight sweep, soft cap, gamma=1.0, detach=true

rejection_notes.loss_weight_0p10: Insufficient; location false SUPPORT remains at 20; total false SUPPORT 35
rejection_notes.loss_weight_0p20: Lower pred SUPPORT min (87) and lower true SUPPORT correct (264) than 0.50 despite lower total false SUPPORT (22)
rejection_notes.loss_weight_0p30: Stage28-I-C reference; 0.50 dominates on total false SUPPORT (18 vs 28) and location false SUPPORT (4 vs 8)

decision.hard_cap_rejection_reason: Hard cap increased false_SUPPORT_total to 58 in Stage28-I-C, exceeding baseline of 44
decision.learned_hybrid_mixing_rejection_reason: Too few product error rescues and too many newly introduced false SUPPORT errors in other categories

interpretation_flags.cap_independence_note: Location-boundary cap is a detached multiplicative soft probability from a separate head; product H1 decision path gradient is unaffected; cap is bounded in [0,1]

remaining_risks: Controlled synthetic no-time setting only; no OOD, time-swap, or naturalistic evaluation performed
Frozen encoder (Mamba backbone) and A-log parameters; results not directly transferable to fine-tuned or longer-context variants without re-evaluation
Ranking loss remains active by default; this is not a CE-only setup; ablating ranking loss would require fresh evaluation
Location-boundary target supervision uses limited positive/negative mapping; sparse or noisy boundary labels in new data could degrade head quality
Needs future evaluation outside controlled no-time data before broader claims or additional architectural commitment

next_recommended_stage.recommendation: Test the frozen Stage28-I final candidate (lb_loss0p50_soft_g1p00_detach) against additional diagnostic data or OOD-style probes to characterize location-boundary cap behavior outside the controlled no-time distribution
constraints: Do not add another router or cap layer unless a specific remaining failure mode demands it
Treat Stage28-I candidate as frozen and evaluate as-is
Defer architectural modifications until Stage29 diagnostics reveal a concrete gap

conclusion: Stage28-I finalizes an independent detached soft location-boundary cap over the product-p0.90 H1 decision path. With loss_weight=0.50 and gamma=1.0, the cap reduces total false SUPPORT from 44 to 18 across three controlled no-time seeds, reduces location false SUPPORT from 27 to 4, preserves missing-evidence rejection at zero false SUPPORT, and improves true SUPPORT correctness from 246 to 266.
